# frontegg_tenant_sso_domain_validation (Resource)

Force-validates an SSO domain for a tenant without requiring DNS TXT record verification. Use this when provisioning SSO programmatically for trusted tenants where DNS verification is impractical.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to force-validate (e.g. `example.com`).
- `tenant_id` (String) The ID of the tenant that owns the SSO domain.
- `validated` (Boolean) Whether to mark the domain as validated.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
